advanced.cadenceDescription: Controls how quickly clicks are generated: either as clicks per interval (Rate) or as a fixed delay between clicks (Delay).
advanced.clickLimitDescription: Stops automatically after the selected number of clicks.
advanced.clickLimitUnavailable: Enable Click Limit to stop automatically after a set number of clicks.
advanced.cornerStopDescription: Stops the clicker when the cursor enters a screen corner. Keep it as a failsafe.
advanced.cornerStopUnavailable: Enable Corner Stop to edit the corner failsafe hitboxes.
advanced.customStopZoneDescription: Stops the clicker when the cursor enters this rectangular area, using absolute screen coordinates that can span multiple monitors.
advanced.doubleClickContentUnavailable: Enable Double Click to adjust the delay between the first and second click.
advanced.doubleClickDescription: Clicks the entered button twice per click at the given interval. Only available under 50cps
advanced.doubleClickUnavailable: Double Click is unavailable at {cps} clicks/sec. Lower the effective click rate below 50 clicks/sec to turn it on.
advanced.dutyCycleDescription: Choose how long the mouse button gets held during each click. 50% at 1 click per second = 0.5sec held, 0.5sec released
advanced.dutyCycleUnavailable: Enable Duty Cycle to edit how long each click is held.
advanced.edgeStopDescription: Stops the clicker when the cursor reaches a screen edge. Keep it as a failsafe.
advanced.edgeStopUnavailable: Enable Edge Stop to edit the edge failsafe hitboxes.
advanced.hotkeyDescription: Choose the key combo that starts and stops the clicker. Use Toggle for press-on/press-off, or Hold to click only while held.
advanced.mouseButtonDescription: Select which mouse button the clicker will press on each click event.
advanced.pickCountdownSingularUnavailable: Position capture starts in 1 second. Move your cursor to the target spot and wait for it to be saved.
advanced.pickCountdownUnavailable: Position capture starts in {seconds} seconds. Move your cursor to the target spot and wait for it to be saved.
advanced.pickInProgressUnavailable: Position capture is already in progress. Wait for the current pick to finish.
advanced.positionDescription: Moves the cursor to the saved point before each click while enabled.
advanced.positionUnavailable: Enable Position to edit or pick a fixed cursor target before each click.
advanced.sequenceClickingDescription: Cycles through saved cursor positions in round-robin order, applying the current global timing and click settings at each point.
advanced.speedVariationDescription: Randomizes click speed by given percentage.
advanced.speedVariationUnavailable: Enable Speed Variation to edit how much the app randomizes your click timing.
advanced.timeLimitDescription: Stops automatically after the selected duration.
advanced.timeLimitUnavailable: Enable Time Limit to stop automatically after a set amount of time.

settings.accentColorDescription: Customize the primary accent used for active states.
settings.alwaysOnTopDescription: Keep the app pinned above other windows.
settings.clearStatsDescription: Permanently delete all locally stored usage data.
settings.minimizeToTrayDescription: When enabled, closing the window hides it to the system tray instead of quitting.
settings.noPresets: No presets saved yet. Save one from your current clicker settings.
settings.presetActionsDisabled: Preset actions are disabled while the clicker is running.
settings.presetLimitReached: Preset limit reached. Delete one before saving another.
settings.presetsDescription: Save and reuse named clicker configurations.
settings.resetAllDescription: Will reset all input fields and settings to the defaults.
settings.runOnStartupDescription: Automatically start BlurAutoClicker with Windows, minimized to tray.
settings.stopHitboxOverlayDescription: Toggles whether the stop hitbox overlay is shown.
settings.stopReasonAlertDescription: Shows why the clicker stopped in the title bar.
settings.strictHotkeyModifiersDescription: On: hotkey only fires when modifier keys match exactly. Off: extra held modifiers are ignored.
settings.themeDescription: Switch between dark and light themes.
settings.usageDataDescription: Your personal clicker stats, tracked locally.

simple.holdDescription: How long the mouse button gets held down during each click
simple.randomizationDescription: Randomly changes click speed in % range of set CPS
simple.selectMouseButton: Select which mouse button gets clicked
simple.switchMode: Switch between hotkey Toggle and Hold mode

update.installAlreadyDownloading: The update is already downloading. Wait for the current install to finish.
update.installAlreadyInstalling: The update is already installing. Wait for it to finish before trying again.
update.installAlreadyPreparing: The update is already being prepared. Wait for it to finish before trying again.
update.installedRestart: Update installed. Restart to apply it.
update.restartFailed: Restart failed. Please reopen the app manually.
